name: Scalloped Oysters in Crock Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up the oysters into small pieces.
2. In a bowl, combine all ingredients except for 2 tablespoons of melted butter. Mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into a lightly greased crock pot.
4. Drizzle the reserved butter over the top.
5. Cover and cook on low setting for 5 to 6 hours.
